info.title: Staffler / DPS-Service API
info.description: Reconstructed OpenAPI spec from `wlnob/dps-service` controllers. Scope: REST endpoints exposed by dps-service Spring Boot 3.2 monolith. Inlined real schemas as of 2026-05-09 from sources/dps-service-dtos.md (priority DTOs only; non-priority types may still be x-stub). Source commit: 1fc6cd30d62ec3bba51285585483a524a22f4238.

BoemmSkey.name: x-boemm-skey
BoemmSkey.description: Opaque session key obtained via /publicapi/companies/users/login or /publicapi/employees/users/login. Resolved by API Gateway authorizer to a Cognito JWT.

BoemmInternal.name: x-boemm-skey
BoemmInternal.description: Internal cron endpoints. Externally not reachable; documented for completeness.

PageWebDto.description: Custom paged envelope (NOT Spring's default Page).

ActualWebDto.description: Returned by paged GET /api/companies/{companyId}/actuals. Note: contractEndDate uses non-standard date-time format 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss' (space, not T).

contractEndDate.description: Non-standard format: 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss' with a space separator, not ISO-8601 'T'. Example: '2026-05-09 17:30:00'.

UserDto.description: Current-user-like projection. Reused inside CompanyCustomerWebDto and AppUserService lookups. Note: there is no GET /api/users/currentuser endpoint.

codeLink.description: URL to redirect the user-agent to.

generalCoefficientsPerStatute.description: Map keyed by CoefficientTypeDto enum values.

CompanyCoefficientsPerStatuteWebDto.description: Same DTO reused for both holiday and general coefficient maps. Each field is the per-statute coefficient.

CompanyWebDto.description: Canonical company resource: same shape on read (GET /api/companies/{companyId}) and write (PUT /api/companies/{uuid}). No separate Create/Update DTOs.

AddressWebDto.description: Shared by company, contract, employee, invitation. NOT the same as boemm-core AddressDTO.

PersonalContactWebDto.description: Embedded as a list on CompanyWebDto.personalContacts.

isExisting.description: True if already in DPS DB.

ContractBaseWebDto.description: Returned by paginated GET /api/contracts and embedded in ContractWorkTimeOverviewDto.

ContractWebDto.description: Both request (POST/PUT) and response on ContractController. Single canonical shape; no separate Create/Update DTO. Carries embedded result holder for batch responses. Time fields use HH:mm format inside timetable.

flexibleTimetable.description: TODO NULL no scope per source comment.

ContractWebDto_ContractEmployeeWageTrave.description: Inner static class on ContractWebDto. Flat shape on the wire under 'travelAllowance'.

ContractWebDto_ContractEmployeeWageMealV.description: Inner static class on ContractWebDto. Flat shape on the wire under 'mealVoucher'.

ContractTimetableDayItemWebDto.description: Time fields use HH:mm pattern via @JsonFormat.

createShiftTemplate.description: Tells server to upsert as a template.

dayOfWeek.description: FE doesn't send this; server derives.

ContractTimetableScheduleItemWebDto.description: Variant used outside the ContractTimetableWebDto schedule (shift-template generation flows). Keyed by dayOfWeek instead of date.

ShiftTemplateWebDto.description: Returned by GET /api/contracts/shiftTemplates (paged) and embedded in ContractWebDto.

ContractBatchCreationResultWebDto.description: Embedded in ContractWebDto.result and returned per-item in POST /api/contracts/batch. Conveys partial-failure details when batch contracts cannot be inserted atomically.

EmployeeContractWebDto.description: Returned by GET /api/my-staffler/employees/{id}/contracts and embedded in StudentBalanceWebDto.

EmployeeInfoRequest.description: DTO EmployeeInfoRequest. Full field definitions in sources/dps-service-dtos.md.

EmployeeWageWebDto.description: Both request (POST/PUT) and response on EmployeeWageController.

EmployeeWebDto.description: Both request (PUT/POST registration) and response (GET /api/employees/{id}, paged GET /api/employees). No separate short/long variant.

EngagementGroupWebDto.description: Lite group reference embedded everywhere (CompanyUser, NewcomerInfo, etc.).

EngagementRequest.description: DTO EngagementRequest. Full field definitions in sources/dps-service-dtos.md.

NewcomerWebDto.description: Body of POST /publicapi/employees/self-registration; returned by GET/PUT /api/newcomers/{id} and paged GET /api/newcomers. Almost identical to EmployeeWebDto.

NotificationCountWebDto.description: Returned by both the actuals and contracts notification-count endpoints. Wire field is 'notificationCount' (long).

NotificationScheduleWebDto.description: Body and response of the …/schedule sub-resource on UserNotificationPreferencesController.

RegistrationReminderDto.description: DTO RegistrationReminderDto. Full field definitions in sources/dps-service-dtos.md.

UserNotificationPreferencesWebDto.description: Both request and response on UserNotificationPreferencesController.

WageIndexationWebDto.description: Body of POST /internalapi/indexations/wages/execute. Surprise: 'statutes' references the JPA entity Statute (not a WebDto); send [{"code":"WHITE_COLLAR"}, ...].

items.description: JPA Statute entity reused as DTO. PoC clients can post {code: '<STATUTE_CODE>'}.

WorkTimeWebDto.description: Mutable unit of an actual's day. Body of PATCH /api/companies/{companyId}/actuals/{actualId}/workTimes is List<WorkTimeWebDto>. Time fields use HH:mm pattern via @JsonFormat.

ConsultantWebDto.description: Embedded across company / contract / wage DTOs.

TaxLevelDTO.description: From eu.boemm.core.dto.employee.TaxLevelDTO (boemm-core shared library, not in dps-service repo). Returned by GET /api/taxLevels. Treat as black-box dictionary item unless you need to dig into the core lib.

ParitairComiteDTO.description: From eu.boemm.core.dto.company.ParitairComiteDTO (boemm-core shared library). Returned by GET /api/paritaircomites. Treat as black-box dictionary item.

CustomerRole.description: Wire-level role on CompanyUserRoleDto, InviteAppUserRequest, CompanyCustomerWebDto.

UserRole.description: Internal full role enum used on CompanyUserDto.role and UserCompanyMembershipDto.role.

StatusWebDto.description: Duplicate of CompanyStatusDto with the same values. Used by CompanyCreateResultWebDto and CompanyWebSearchResultWebDto.

SupportedStatutes.description: Used by CompanyCoefficientsPerStatuteWebDto.getCoefficient(...) to switch on statute code.

ContractStatusWebDto.description: From eu.boemm.dps.contract.model.dto. Note: source-of-truth lists 8 values, NOT the 9-value subset in the original priority list. CANCEL_VALIDATION and DELETED appear instead of OVERDUE / COMPLETED / CANCELED on this enum.

ContractSourceWebDto.description: Tracks which subsystem originated the contract.

GenderWebDto.description: Source enum lists MALE, FEMALE, OTHER. Note: the original priority list mentions 'X' but the source-of-truth enum uses OTHER.

EmployeeInvitationStatus.description: Entity enum reused on the wire (non-WebDto package).

DictionaryType.description: Internal enum (not on the wire) — each enum value is what the URL path {resourceType} is matched against.

id.description: Same as userId but as String

DictionaryItemWebDto.description: Generic dictionary item shape from boemm-core. Two fields only.

code.description: Verified live: WHITE_COLLAR, LABOUR, FLEX_LABOUR, FLEX_WHITE_COLLAR, WHITE_COLLAR_STUDENT, LABOUR_STUDENT, EXTRA, SEASONAL_LABOUR, ...

collar.description: Live values are WHITE or BLUE, NOT WHITE_COLLAR/LABOUR

AddressDTO.description: Canonical from boemm-core-dto. NOT AddressWebDto. Note real field names.

get.summary: Get default + per-statute coefficients for a company

Mark this membership as the user's last viewed

Cognito GlobalSignOut, invalidates refresh token

post.summary: Company-pool login. Returns AuthResultWebDto with skey
Trigger Cognito ForgotPassword (sends email confirmation code)
Confirm Cognito password reset with code

get.summary: Get contract by id (rich shape)

put.summary: Update / change status of a contract

get.summary: Search contracts (paged ContractBaseWebDto)
Count of contracts needing attention (UNDER_REPAIR, etc.)
Search reusable shift templates for a company

post.summary: Regenerate work times from contract timetable

get.summary: List computed work times of a contract
Cross-employee work-time overview per date range
Get employee by id
Search employees in a company pool
List employee invitations for a company
Public lookup of an employee invitation by id
List employee wages
Calculate travel allowance between two addresses
List employees in engagement groups (or unassigned)
Search engagement groups in a company
Get engagement group by id
Get itsme OAuth2 authorization URL
itsme OAuth2 callback (redirects to SPA)

post.summary: Employee-pool login. Returns AuthResultWebDto with skey

get.summary: MyStaffler: get contracts for an employee
List newcomers (verified or not) for a company
Get newcomer by id
Get invited newcomer's draft Employee shape
Get notification preferences
Get notification schedule
Get current authenticated user (DpsUserDetailsWebDto)
